inputs.label: Total Outstanding Shares
inputs.businessContext: Current total number of shares issued and outstanding before the new issuance.

inputs.label: New Shares Issued
inputs.businessContext: Number of new shares to be created and issued in the funding round.

inputs.label: Investor's Current Shares
inputs.businessContext: Number of shares currently owned by the investor before the round.

inputs.label: Investor's New Shares Purchased
inputs.businessContext: Number of new shares the investor purchases in this round (0 if not participating).
